source:
#Imports
import json
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp, to_date, when, substring
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws, regexp_replace
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType, DecimalType
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.legacy.timeParserPolicy", "LEGACY")

#Get Parameter from controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "fuel_transactions_silver"
lake_db_name = "silver"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname) 

#display(df2)

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch

#Get Current Date
Date_Collection = spark.sql("select current_timestamp() AS Current,(current_timestamp() + interval '-1' second) AS EndDate").collect()
Silver_LoadDate = Date_Collection[0]['Current']
Silver_UpdateEndDate = Date_Collection[0]['EndDate']
# Table: **fuel_transactions**: START

#UTILS: Set table name

#tablename="fuel_transactions"

#UTILS: Drop table

#spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE IF EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{tablename}""")
#raw_output_path = f"abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{tablename}"
#mssparkutils.fs.rm(raw_output_path,recurse=True)
#Set table name
db_tablename="fuel_transactions"

#Create Table

spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
(
    TransactionId STRING,
    TransactionEffectiveDate DATE,
    SiteCode STRING,
    Product STRING,
    StandardisedProduct STRING,
    Quantity DECIMAL(20,5),
    UsageCategory STRING,
    RecordSourceTableName STRING,
    RecordSourceHashKey STRING,
    CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCOps INT,
    CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
    HashKey STRING,
    HashDiff STRING  
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Condition 1: UsageCategory threshold determination

df_UsageCategoryThreshold = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT  
                            ref.NumericValue AS NumericValue
                        FROM esg_sharepoint_bronze.reference_data ref
                        WHERE ref.CDCCurrentFlag = 1 AND Code = 'M18'
                    """)

Threshold_Value = df_UsageCategoryThreshold.collect()[0]["NumericValue"]
#display(Threshold_Value)

# Condition 2: UsageCategory determination (stationary cards)

df_stationarycard1 = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT  
                            ref.Description AS CardNumber,
                            ref.NumericValue AS UC
                        FROM esg_sharepoint_bronze.reference_data ref
                        WHERE ref.CDCCurrentFlag = 1 AND Code IN ('FC1','FC2')
                    """)
df_stationarycard1 = df_stationarycard1.withColumn("StationaryCardNumber", substring("CardNumber", -5, 5))
df_stationarycard1 = df_stationarycard1.withColumn("UsageCategory", when(col("UC") == 2, "Stationary").otherwise("Transport"))

#display(df_stationarycard1)

df_stationarycard1.createOrReplaceTempView("TempStationaryCard")

# Standardising Product names 
df_product = spark.sql(f"""
                        SELECT 
                            ref.Description AS Product, 
                            ref.NumericValue AS FuelType
                        FROM esg_sharepoint_bronze.reference_data ref
                        WHERE ref.CDCCurrentFlag = 1 AND Dataset = 'ProductType'
                    """)
#display(df_product)
df_product.createOrReplaceTempView("TempProduct")

# Get records
df_silver = spark.sql(f""" 
                        SELECT 
                            TransactionId, 
                            TransactionEffectiveDate,
                            SiteCode,
                            Product,
                            StandardisedProduct, 
                            Quantity,
                            RecordSourceTableName, 
                            RecordSourceHashKey,
                            FileOverrideFlag, 
                            Stationary_category
                        FROM
                        (SELECT distinct
                            bp.TransactionReceiptNumber AS TransactionId, 
                            bp.TransactionEffectiveDate AS TransactionEffectiveDate,
                            f.Facility AS SiteCode,
                            bp.Product AS Product,
                            CASE WHEN t.FuelType = '1' THEN "Unleaded Petrol" ELSE "Diesel" END AS StandardisedProduct, 
                            bp.Litres AS Quantity,
                            'bp_fuel_transactions' AS RecordSourceTableName, 
                            bp.HashKey as RecordSourceHashKey,
                            false as FileOverrideFlag,
                            sc.UC AS Stationary_category
                        FROM bp_bronze.bp_fuel_transactions bp
                        LEFT JOIN esg_sharepoint_bronze.fuelcard_facility_map f ON f.FuelCardNumber = bp.CardNumber AND f.CDCCurrentFlag = 1 
                        LEFT JOIN TempProduct t ON t.Product = bp.Product
                        LEFT JOIN TempStationaryCard sc ON sc.StationaryCardNumber = bp.CardNumber
                        WHERE bp.Product IN (t.Product) AND bp.CDCCurrentFlag = 1 
                        and (to_date(bp.TransactionEffectiveDate,'dd/MM/yyyy') BETWEEN to_date(f.ValidFromDate,'yyyy-MM-dd') AND to_date(f.ValidToDate,'yyyy-MM-dd'))

                        UNION ALL

                        SELECT  
                            a.TransactionNumber AS TransactionId, 
                            a.TransactionDate AS TransactionEffectiveDate,
                            'SBK' AS SiteCode,
                            a.Product AS Product,
                            CASE WHEN t.FuelType = '1' THEN "Unleaded Petrol" ELSE "Diesel" END AS StandardisedProduct, 
                            a.QuantityPerLitres AS Quantity,
                            'ampol_fuel_transactions' AS RecordSourceTableName, 
                            a.HashKey as RecordSourceHashKey,
                            false as FileOverrideFlag,
                            f.UC AS Stationary_category
                        FROM ampol_bronze.ampol_fuel_transactions a
                        LEFT JOIN TempProduct t ON t.Product = a.Product
                        LEFT JOIN TempStationaryCard f ON f.StationaryCardNumber = a.CardNumber
                        WHERE a.Product IN (t.Product) AND a.CDCCurrentFlag = 1 

                        UNION ALL

                        SELECT  
                            CONCAT(m.InvoiceNumber, m.FileRowIndex) AS TransactionId, 
                            m.TransactionDate AS TransactionEffectiveDate,
                            m.SiteCode AS SiteCode,
                            m.Product AS Product, 
                            CASE WHEN t.FuelType = '1' THEN "Unleaded Petrol" ELSE "Diesel" END AS StandardisedProduct, 
                            m.Quantity AS Quantity,
                            'marano_fuel_transactions' AS RecordSourceTableName, 
                            m.HashKey AS RecordSourceHashKey,
                            FileOverrideFlag,
                            '' as Stationary_category
                        FROM marano_bronze.marano_fuel_transactions m
                        LEFT JOIN TempProduct t ON t.Product = m.Product
                        WHERE m.Product IN (t.Product) AND m.CDCCurrentFlag = 1 --and m.FileOverrideFlag = 0
                        AND (m.InvoiceNumber IS NOT NULL and m.TransactionDate is not null and m.CardNumber is not null and m.SupplyPoint is not null)

                        UNION ALL

                        SELECT  
                            CONCAT(mb.InvoiceNumber, mb.FileRowIndex) AS TransactionId, 
                            mb.InvoiceDate AS TransactionEffectiveDate,
                            mb.SiteCode AS SiteCode,
                            mb.Product AS Product, 
                            CASE WHEN t.FuelType = '1' THEN "Unleaded Petrol" ELSE "Diesel" END AS StandardisedProduct, 
                            mb.Quantity AS Quantity,
                            'marano_bulk_fuel_transactions' AS RecordSourceTableName, 
                            mb.HashKey AS RecordSourceHashKey,
                            FileOverrideFlag,
                            '' as Stationary_category
                        FROM marano_bronze.marano_bulk_fuel_transactions mb 
                        LEFT JOIN TempProduct t ON t.Product = mb.Product                                                
                        WHERE mb.Product IN (t.Product) AND mb.CDCCurrentFlag = 1 AND mb.InvoiceNumber IS NOT NULL --and mb.FileOverrideFlag = 0

                        UNION ALL

                        SELECT  
                            CONCAT(fo.ID, fo.TransactionNumber) AS TransactionId, 
                            fo.TransactionDate AS TransactionEffectiveDate,
                            fo.SiteCode AS SiteCode,
                            fo.Product AS Product,
                            CASE WHEN t.FuelType = '1' THEN "Unleaded Petrol" ELSE "Diesel" END AS StandardisedProduct, 
                            fo.Quantity AS Quantity,
                            'fuel_override' AS RecordSourceTableName, 
                            fo.HashKey AS RecordSourceHashKey,
                            false as FileOverrideFlag,
                            CASE WHEN fo.UsageCategory = 'Stationary' THEN 2 ELSE '' END as Stationary_category
                        FROM override_bronze.fuel_override fo
                        LEFT JOIN TempProduct t ON t.Product = fo.Product                                                
                        WHERE fo.Product IN (t.Product) AND fo.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
                        )
                    """)
#display(df_silver)

# Convert STRING to DECIMAL
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CleanQuantity", regexp_replace(col("Quantity"), ",", "").cast(DecimalType(20,5)))

# Convert STRING to DATE
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CleanTransactionEffectiveDate", to_date(col("TransactionEffectiveDate"), "d/M/yyyy"))

# Define UsageCategory value based on threshold
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("UsageCategory", when(df_silver["Stationary_category"] == 2, "Stationary").when(df_silver["CleanQuantity"] < Threshold_Value, "Transportation").otherwise("Stationary"))

# Add CDC columns
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

# New HashKey for current load
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "TransactionId", regexp_replace("TransactionEffectiveDate", "-|[/.:]", ""), "SiteCode", "Product", "RecordSourceHashKey"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "StandardisedProduct", "Quantity", "UsageCategory", "RecordSourceTableName"), 256))

df_silver = df_silver.orderBy("TransactionEffectiveDate")

#display(df_silver)

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_silver.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# SCD2 logic

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED AND s.FileOverrideFlag = 0 THEN
      INSERT ( TransactionId, TransactionEffectiveDate, SiteCode, Product, StandardisedProduct, Quantity, UsageCategory, RecordSourceTableName, RecordSourceHashKey, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCOps, CDCCurrentFlag, HashKey, HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.TransactionId, s.CleanTransactionEffectiveDate, s.SiteCode, s.Product, s.StandardisedProduct, s.CleanQuantity, s.UsageCategory, s.RecordSourceTableName,s.RecordSourceHashKey, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, 1, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashKey, s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag = true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED AND s.FileOverrideFlag = 0 THEN
      INSERT ( TransactionId, TransactionEffectiveDate, SiteCode, Product, StandardisedProduct, Quantity, UsageCategory, RecordSourceTableName, RecordSourceHashKey, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCOps, CDCCurrentFlag, HashKey, HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.TransactionId, s.CleanTransactionEffectiveDate, s.SiteCode, s.Product, s.StandardisedProduct, s.CleanQuantity, s.UsageCategory, s.RecordSourceTableName,s.RecordSourceHashKey, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, 1, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.HashKey, s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to updated override records to CDCCurrentFlag = false
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag = true and s.FileOverrideFlag = true
    WHEN MATCHED THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                t.CDCOps = 0

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Silver_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Silver_Update = Silver_Update_Post - Silver_Update_Pre
Silver_Insert = (Silver_Insert_Post - Silver_Insert_Pre) + Silver_Update
Silver_Delete = Silver_Delete_Post - Silver_Delete_Pre
Silver_ActiveRows = Silver_ActiveRecord_Post 
Silver_TotalRows = Silver_TotalRowCount_Post

#Create df_log dataframe to insert into controldb logging tables

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Silver_LoadDate,Silver_Insert,Silver_Update,Silver_Delete,Silver_ActiveRows,Silver_TotalRows)]
#print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
# Table **fuel_transactions**: END
